title: Model AI failure by cause, consequence and recovery
summary: Refusal, safety block, timeout, rate limit, unavailable tool, malformed output, partial success and unsafe result remain distinct states.
guidance: Preserve valid work, say what did and did not happen, provide a specific recovery and protect side effects from duplicates. Log enough context for accountability without exposing secrets or private reasoning.
do: Make side-effect retries explicit and idempotent
dont: Collapse every failure into Try again
verification: Refusal, timeout, 429, unavailable-tool, malformed, partial-success and duplicate-side-effect tests
